name: openclaw-skills
description: Curated production-ready skills for OpenClaw agent framework

skills.name: uncensored-fallback
skills.description: Robust fallback to uncensored OpenRouter models when primary model refuses due to safety/alignment filters. Supports streaming, smart temperature strategies, centralized API key handling, and easy integration into the main agent loop.

skills.name: github
skills.description: Manage GitHub repos, issues, PRs, releases, and workflows via curl + jq (gh CLI when available). Read-only works without a token; write ops need GITHUB_TOKEN.
